
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Oma's Hot Buttered Rum.
    Summary: Nathan,

Oma Dianne has some of the best recipes! When she decided to move from her home into assisted living she allowed me to have her recipe cards. I have not made all of them but I can almost guarantee they are the best. Just like you and your soon to be little brother. I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 0.25 lb butter, 1 lb dark brown sugar, 0.25 tsp ground cinnamon, 0.25 tsp ground nutmeg, 0.25 tsp ground cloves, 1.5 oz dark rum, to taste  fum flavoring, fill  boiling hot water
    Tags: undefined

    Make sure the picture includes a garden gnome in it.
